source: User clarified dogfood/source confusion test is useful for CodeWiki development but not applicable to software development in general, so it should not be part of source distributed to developers.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Fresh validation is preferred; policy may require it for high-risk semantic gates.

next_loop.reason: The next compiler loop should start from the build handoff, not the producing compiler context.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

summary: Accepted TASK-090 scope correction: dogfood/source confusion is CodeWiki development-only and must not be part of distributed general alignment drift fixture matrix.

diff_table.current_state: TASK-090 fixture matrix includes dogfood-source-confusion as a distributed alignment drift fixture case.
diff_table.desired_state: Remove dogfood-source-confusion from TASK-090 distributed fixture matrix and smoke runner. Keep TASK-090 focused on generally applicable alignment drift classes.
diff_table.rationale: Dogfood/source confusion is specific to CodeWiki self-development and should not be presented as general-purpose software-development drift coverage.
diff_table.risk: Low: reduces fixture scope to portable drift classes.

accepted_decisions.summary: Dogfood/source confusion is excluded from TASK-090 distributed fixture matrix.
